Short CV

Born in İstanbul, 1989. She finished Mecidiyeköy Anatolian High School in 2007 and Florence Nightingale School of Science in Istanbul University in 2011 with the first prize.

She did her internship in Group Florence Nightingale Hospitals. She spent two years at the Florence Nightingale Hospital in Gayrettepe as a NICU Nurse and Operating Room Nurse. She acted as a NICU Nurse for 1 year and a half in İstanbul Surgical Hospital. In 2013, she started her master's degree in Marmara University Internal Medicine Nursing Department. In 2013, she started to work as a lecturer in the First and Emergency Assistance Program of the Vocational School of Health Services at Üsküdar University.
